data.description: Cerillion PLC sees its price target reduced to 2,015p by Berenberg from 2,200p.

data.title: Global Truck Loader Crane Market Set to Reach USD 4.5 Billion by 2035 as Smart Lifting Solutions Gain Momentum Across Construction and Logistics
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a recent study conducted by Future Market Insights revealed that the global market for truck loader cranes is on a consistent growth path. The increase in demand for material handling solutions that are efficient, versatile, and prioritize safety is fueling this growth. Key numbers in this trend include a significant rise in market demand and a noticeable shift towards innovative solutions for handling materials.

Dubai South signs MoU with Emirates NBD aimed at strengthening SME financial growth within its business zone.

data.title: Duni Group launches d.ls - Duni Lighting Solutions, introducing both a professional cordless lighting portfolio and a design collection
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, Duni Group has announced the introduction of d.ls – Duni Lighting Solutions on April 22, 2026. This new brand aims to enhance the Group's services for the HoReCa industry. It features an inventive cordless lighting collection tailored for daily use in hospitality settings. This expansion represents the company's dedication to innovative products for this sector, showcasing its commitment to meeting the evolving needs of customers.

data.title: Lingnan ICH Shines on the Global Haute Couture Stage: One Heung Kong and Guangdong Fashion Week Forge a New Paradigm for Chinese Original Design
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on April 22, 2026, it was reported that the global fashion industry is currently experiencing a restructuring phase with a focus on Oriental aesthetics becoming prominent in international creative endeavors. The 2026 Guangdong Fashion Week Spring Session, held from April 17 to 24, played a significant role in showcasing this trend.

data.title: EQT AB (publ) Q1 Announcement 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Stockholm, EQT showcased impressive performance amidst a volatile market, marked by AI-driven fluctuations and geopolitical uncertainty. Despite challenges, the company executed efficiently. Noteworthy was their disciplined approach despite the market environment, as highlighted in the recent quarter.

data.title: ImmunoForge to Accelerate CNS Drug Development with Innovative BBB Shuttle Platform 'LMT15'
data.description: ImmunoForge's LMT15 Platform has successfully integrated a high BBB permeability feature with their unique long-acting ELP technology, as confirmed by their first-place win at the 'Novo Nordisk Partnering Day Korea 2026' event. The company, based in SEOUL, South Korea, made this achievement on April 22, 2026.

data.title: PassiveLogic Appoints Joel Harvill as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 22, 2026, in Salt Lake City, PassiveLogic, a pioneering company in physical AI for autonomous buildings, welcomed finance and capital markets expert Joel Harvill to their team. This strategic decision is geared towards advancing the future growth of the company in scaling its innovative technologies.

data.title: Algorand and Aptos at the forefront in quantum-resistant blockchain, Coinbase warns of threats to proof-of-stake networks.
data.description: Coinbase has issued a warning about the vulnerabilities faced by proof-of-stake blockchains due to quantum threats. They highlighted that Algorand and Aptos are more adept and better prepared for this transition.

data.title: Hong Kong auctions RMB sovereign bonds; results to be announced on April 22, highlighting RMB's rising global finance influence.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has disclosed the outcomes of the tender for 2-year RMB sovereign bonds, emphasizing the increasing significance of the RMB in worldwide finance. This move underscores the currency's strengthening position in the global market.
